title: Device Home Screen - Charge Case battery charging icon
scenario: Verify Charge Case battery icon shows charging sign when plugged in and no charging sign when unplugged, with earbuds inside and case opened (Tern/Emu).
steps: 1. Ensure both earbuds are inside the Charge Case (for Tern and Emu).
3. Plug the charger into the Charge Case.
4. Observe the battery icon on the Charge Case.
5. Unplug the charger from the Charge Case.
6. Observe the battery icon on the Charge Case again.
expected: The battery icon on the Charge Case shows a charging sign when the charger is plugged in, and no charging sign when unplugged.
